server.name: axis-toolbox
server.description: AXIS Toolbox MCP Server — exposes codebase analysis, generator execution, and governance query capabilities as MCP tools and resources.

tools.name: analyze_repo
tools.description: Run a full AXIS Toolbox snapshot analysis on a codebase. Accepts a local directory path or GitHub URL. Returns the context map, repo profile, and architecture summary.

source.description: Local directory path or GitHub repository URL

programs.description: List of programs to run (default: all unlocked). Values: search, debug, skills, frontend, theme, brand, notebook, artifacts, optimization, marketing, mcp, obsidian, superpowers, remotion, canvas, algorithmic

tools.name: run_generator
tools.description: Execute a single generator from a specific program against an existing snapshot. Useful for regenerating individual artifacts.

tools.name: get_context_map
tools.description: Retrieve the context map for a project. The context map contains project identity, architecture layers, quantified metrics, critical paths, and invariants.

tools.name: get_repo_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the repo profile for a project. Contains language detection results, framework detection, structure summary, and health assessment.

tools.name: query_capabilities
tools.description: Query the capability inventory. Returns grade (A/B/F) and evidence for each capability.

tools.name: get_generated_file
tools.description: Retrieve a specific generated artifact from a snapshot's output.

filePath.description: Relative path of the generated file (e.g., '.ai/context-map.json', 'AGENTS.md')

tools.name: list_programs
tools.description: List all 17 AXIS programs with their generator counts, tiers, grades, and output file specifications.

tools.name: query_governance
tools.description: Query the YAML governance layer. Returns the content and interpretation of any of the 12 constitutional YAML files.

file.description: Name of the governance YAML file to query

section.description: Optional: specific section within the YAML to return

resources.name: axis://programs
resources.description: Complete program catalog: all 17 programs with generators, tiers, grades, and output specifications

resources.name: axis://capabilities
resources.description: Full capability inventory: 82 capabilities with grades (A/B/F) and evidence

resources.name: axis://governance/{file}
resources.description: Individual YAML governance file content. Replace {file} with: begin, continuation, axis_all_tools, etc.

resources.name: axis://snapshot/{id}
resources.description: Full snapshot data including context map, repo profile, and all generated artifacts for a given snapshot ID

resources.name: axis://health
resources.description: System health: test counts, coverage, capability grades, uptime

prompts.name: analyze_and_improve
prompts.description: Analyze a codebase with AXIS Toolbox and provide improvement recommendations based on the generated artifacts.

arguments.name: focus
arguments.description: Focus area: architecture, testing, documentation, performance, security

prompts.name: generate_agent_context
prompts.description: Generate optimized context files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules) for a codebase to improve AI assistant effectiveness.

arguments.name: targetAgent
arguments.description: Target AI assistant: copilot, claude, cursor, cody

authentication.description: API key from AXIS Toolbox dashboard (Settings → API Keys)
